ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the component's datasheet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the parameter */,
  "parameter_category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter (e.g., electrical, mechanical, environmental) */,
  "parameter_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the unit */,
  "unit_category" TEXT /* Category of the unit (e.g., length, time, frequency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spec_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specification the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the specification */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the specification */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the specification */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user to access the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specification that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "change_justification" TEXT /* Justification for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specification the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., frequency report, loss report) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
